title: Retry: Fix Correspondence (Korespondencja) printable letter PDF layout

requirements.text: Update the Correspondence (Korespondencja) printable letter PDF so the main letter body text is left-aligned (not centered) in the PDF generated by `generateLetterPDF` in `frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts`.
acceptanceCriteria: Generating a PDF from the Korespondencja page produces a letter where the body text block is visibly left-aligned (not centered) on the page.

The change is applied specifically to the PDF layout generated by `generateLetterPDF` in `frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts` and does not break other PDF generators (e.g., `generateParishPDF`, events PDF).

requirements.text: Update the Correspondence (Korespondencja) printable letter PDF so the signature block containing the lines "Z ufnością w Boże miłosierdzie" and "ks. Marek Michalczyk" is shifted slightly to the right (not centered at the bottom of the page) in the PDF generated by `generateLetterPDF` in `frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts`.
acceptanceCriteria: Generating a PDF from the Korespondencja page produces a letter where the signature block is clearly positioned to the right of center (i.e., not centered).
The signature block alignment change applies only to the letter PDF generated by `generateLetterPDF`.

constraints: Do not modify any files under the frontend immutable paths (e.g., `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts`, `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts`, `frontend/src/main.tsx`, `frontend/src/components/ui`).
Keep the backend data model and canister APIs unchanged; this request is strictly a PDF layout adjustment.
nonGoals: Do not implement the new "Chrzty" (Baptisms) section as part of this request.
Do not change letter CRUD behavior, searching, sorting, or backend storage for letters.
Do not introduce new authentication/authorization behavior.
